holdings.infoBox: BAIV is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are ICON Public Limited Company stock at 4.81%, The Magnum Ice Cream Company at 4.08%, Brenntag SE at 3.19%, Sanofi at 2.64%, and British American Tobacco PLC ADR at 2.59%.

overview.description: The Brown Advisory International Value Select ETF (BAIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund contains a concentrated stock portfolio of companies located outside of the US. Portfolio holdings are actively managed, based on fundamental research and AI-driven tools, to provide a true value strategy. BAIV was launched on Feb 25, 2026 and is issued by Brown Advisory.
